types.title: What kind of Morocco trip do you want?
types.body: Private tours built around your interests — from Sahara dunes to ancient medinas, birdsong to yoga sunsets.
types.depart_title: Where do you want to depart from?

featured.title: Featured Tours
featured.body: Our most-requested private itineraries — each one fully customisable to your travel dates and group size.

quote.text: "We love to share with our guests the peace and the Moroccan way of life — every journey is a chance to discover something genuine."

why.title: Why should you travel with us?
why.body: Testimonials tell one story. Here's ours.

items.title: Authenticity first
items.body: Local Berber guides who love sharing their culture, not just showing landmarks.

items.title: Completely private
items.body: Your group only — no strangers, no fixed schedules, no rushed stops.

items.title: Tailor-made for you
items.body: Every detail shaped around your pace, interests, and travel style.

items.title: Handpicked stays
items.body: Riads, desert camps and mountain lodges chosen for character and warmth.

items.title: Door-to-door service
items.body: We collect you from any arrival city and handle every transfer.

items.title: Sustainable travel
items.body: We support local communities and travel gently with nature and wildlife.

testimonials.title: Reviews from people like you
testimonials.body: Our guests' stories are the most honest proof of what we do.

items.name: Lars & Marja
items.text: Exotic places we would never have found alone. A family atmosphere, charming riads, and dining experiences that were simply fantastic. Our best trip ever.

items.name: Anne
items.text: Our guide's exceptional knowledge of history and culture, and his desire to share it with us, was truly extraordinary.

items.name: Toril & Andreas
items.text: Breakfast on top of a dune was truly amazing. Nothing but positive experiences — comfort, security, and a once-in-a-lifetime cultural encounter.

cta.title: Ready to explore Morocco?
cta.sub: Tell us your dates and we'll shape a trip that fits perfectly. No two journeys are the same.

about.hero_sub: Your trusted private transport partner across Morocco since 2014.
about.intro: Elbo Tours was founded in Marrakech with a simple mission: to provide travellers with safe, comfortable and affordable private transport throughout Morocco.

stats.title: 10+ Years
stats.desc: Serving travellers from across the world with premium transport services.

stats.title: 3 Languages
stats.desc: Our drivers speak English, French and Arabic for seamless communication.

stats.title: 5,000+ Clients
stats.desc: Thousands of happy travellers have trusted us with their Moroccan journey.

transfers.hero_sub: Getting Around Morocco From Anywhere — door-to-door, fixed price, no surprises.

why.title: Fixed Prices
why.desc: No meters, no surprises. Pay what you agreed.

why.title: On Time
why.desc: Flight tracking for all airport pickups.

why.title: Door to Door
why.desc: From your accommodation to your destination.

why.title: All Morocco
why.desc: Any city, any airport, any time.

steps.title: Book Online or WhatsApp
steps.desc: Send us your travel details — date, time, pickup/dropoff, number of passengers.

steps.title: Get Instant Confirmation
steps.desc: We confirm your transfer within minutes with driver details and fixed price.

steps.title: We Track Your Flight
steps.desc: For airport pickups, we monitor your flight in real-time and adjust if delayed.

steps.title: Comfortable Journey
steps.desc: Your driver meets you with a name sign. Enjoy a clean, air-conditioned vehicle.

transfers.airport_sub: Meet & greet, name sign, flight tracking — all included at every Moroccan airport.
transfers.city_sub: All prices are per vehicle. Minivan and minibus also available for groups.
transfers.custom_route: Don't see your route? Ask us for a custom quote →
transfers.cta_sub: Book your transfer today. Fast WhatsApp confirmation, professional drivers.

fleet.hero_sub: Modern, air-conditioned vehicles for every group size.

vehicles.name: Standard Car
vehicles.desc: Comfortable sedan ideal for individuals, couples and small families. Airport transfers and city rides.

vehicles.name: Minivan
vehicles.desc: Spacious, modern minivan perfect for families and small groups touring Morocco. Air-conditioned, generous luggage space, and a smooth ride for long desert or mountain routes.

vehicles.name: Minibus
vehicles.desc: Our largest vehicle, ideal for group tours, corporate travel and large family trips across Morocco.

tours_page.title: Tours & Excursions
tours_page.sub: Hand-picked experiences across Morocco — from desert adventures to city discoveries and seamless transfers.
tours_page.no_tours_title: No tours in this category yet
tours_page.no_tours_sub: Check back soon or contact us for a custom itinerary.
tours_page.cta_title: Can't find what you're looking for?
tours_page.cta_sub: We create custom itineraries for any group size. Just tell us your dream trip.

contact.title: Ready to Travel?
contact.subtitle: Contact us for a personalised quote or instant WhatsApp booking.
contact.name: Full name
contact.sent_sub: We will get back to you shortly.

footer.desc: Morocco-based private transport specialists. Comfortable, reliable and personalised transfers for every journey.
